title: Tick Control in Garden City, NY | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Garden City, Long Island. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Starting at $125. Same-day service available.
intro: Garden City's beautifully landscaped properties and proximity to Eisenhower Park create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. Our professional tick control services protect Garden City residents and their families from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with comprehensive yard treatments. We serve homeowners throughout this historic Nassau County village, from Cathedral Avenue to Stewart Avenue.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Long Island communities with eco-conscious tick treatments tailored to Garden City's unique suburban landscape. Our licensed technicians understand the specific tick species prevalent in Nassau County and use targeted barrier sprays that protect your family and pets while preserving your property's pristine appearance.
localContext: Garden City's tree-lined streets, mature landscaping, and proximity to wooded areas like Eisenhower Park and the Garden City Golf Club make tick prevention essential for homeowners. We service properties throughout the incorporated village, including estates near the Garden City Hotel and family homes in the residential neighborhoods surrounding Adelphi University.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Garden City, NY?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Garden City typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May through August. However, deer ticks can be active any time temperatures are above freezing. We recommend starting preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining them throughout the warm months for optimal protection.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Garden City?
faqs.answer: Tick control services in Garden City range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size and treatment frequency. Most residential properties fall within the $150-$225 range for a single application. We offer seasonal packages with multiple treatments throughout tick season that provide better value and more comprehensive protection.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for children and pets in Garden City?
faqs.answer: Yes, our tick control treatments are completely safe for children and pets once dried, typically within 2-3 hours. We use EPA-registered products specifically designed for residential use and follow all safety guidelines. Our technicians can coordinate treatment times to minimize any disruption to your family's routine.

faqs.question: How often should I get tick control treatment for my Garden City property?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection, we recommend tick control treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak tick season (April through October) in Garden City. Properties bordering wooded areas like Eisenhower Park or with heavy deer activity may benefit from more frequent treatments. We'll assess your specific property and recommend a customized treatment schedule.
